title: Fix warthog z-order bug in grazing.html

log.context: Fix warthog z-order bug in grazing.html

Done. Here's what was implemented:

**`drawForegroundTiles()` function** added at line 3009 in `/mnt/data/hello-world/grazing.html`:
- Computes the warthog bounding box from `warthog.x/y`, `WARTHOG_W` (60), `WARTHOG_H` (30)
- Calculates the tile range that could overlap that bbox (no full-map scan)
- For each tile of type 4 (tree) or 5 (rock) in that range, checks if `tileCenterY > wCenterY` (tile visually in front of warthog)
- If so, redraws it directly on `ctx` using the exact same drawing co...(truncated)
